tripPoisAiPrompt.metaDescription: Generate trip point-of-interest proposals with AI and save them to your map.
tripPoisAiPrompt.title: AI POIs
tripPoisAiPrompt.description: Prepare a guided prompt, paste it into your favorite AI tool, and turn the response into saved trip points of interest.
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.title: Configure the generation
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.stepsLabel: Steps to generate AI points of interest
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.placeTitle: Which area should the points be generated around?
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.placeHelper: Use an area, neighborhood or trip base point so the AI suggests sensible nearby places.
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.placePlaceholder: E.g. historic center, main station or accommodation area
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.placeFieldHelper: Search a place, choose a result, pin the point on the map or use your current location.
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.typeTitle: Which point type do you want to generate?
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.typeHelper: Choose a single point family to keep the result clear and actionable.
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.promptHelper: Copy the prompt, run it in your AI tool and ask it to return JSON only.
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.importHelper: Paste the AI response here to turn it into saveable candidates.
tripPoisAiPrompt.wizard.helper: You can adjust the place and type whenever you want. The prompt updates instantly.
tripPoisAiPrompt.prompt.title: Prompt for the AI
tripPoisAiPrompt.prompt.label: Generated prompt
tripPoisAiPrompt.prompt.helper: Open your preferred AI tool, paste the prompt and ask it to return JSON only.
tripPoisAiPrompt.prompt.copyFallback: Automatic copy failed. Select the text and copy it manually.
tripPoisAiPrompt.import.title: Import response
tripPoisAiPrompt.import.description: Paste the JSON returned by the AI here to review the points before saving them.
tripPoisAiPrompt.import.label: JSON response
tripPoisAiPrompt.import.helper: The response must be plain JSON, without markdown fences or extra text.
tripPoisAiPrompt.import.invalidJson: The response does not contain valid JSON.
tripPoisAiPrompt.import.invalidShape: The JSON response does not match the expected point-of-interest structure.
tripPoisAiPrompt.import.empty: No valid points could be extracted from the response.
tripPoisAiPrompt.candidates.title: Detected points
tripPoisAiPrompt.candidates.empty: There are no prepared points yet.
tripPoisAiPrompt.candidates.saved: The selected points were saved successfully.
tripPoisAiPrompt.candidates.partialSaved: {saved} points were saved, but {failed} failed. Review them and try again.
tripPoisAiPrompt.candidates.saveError: The selected points could not be saved.
tripPoisAiPrompt.candidates.noneSelected: Select at least one point before saving.
tripPois.createAiAction: Generate points of interest with AI
